evals.prompt: Link all my tunnels so they can see each other
expectations: Explains that all tunnels can now reach each other

evals.prompt: Open port 443 on my Home Server tunnel to the internet
evals.expected_output: Creates a firewall rule for TCP 443
expectations: Lists tunnels to find Home Server's tunnel token and IP
Calls firewall_rule_add with protocol=TCP, src_ip=0.0.0.0/0, dst_port=443
Uses the correct tunnel IP as dst_ip

evals.prompt: Only let my MacBook and iPhone see each other, not my other devices
evals.expected_output: Creates bidirectional firewall rules between the two tunnels
expectations: Lists tunnels to find MacBook and iPhone tunnel tokens and IPs
Creates a rule allowing MacBook IP to reach iPhone IP
Creates a rule allowing iPhone IP to reach MacBook IP
Does NOT enable link-all (selective mesh only)

evals.prompt: Show me my current firewall rules
evals.expected_output: Lists all firewall rules and mesh status
expectations: Presents rules in a readable format
